name: Linde plc
description: Linde plc is a leading global industrial gases and engineering company that serves a diverse range of end markets, including chemicals, energy, food, healthcare, manufacturing, and electronics. The company provides high-quality solutions, technologies, and services that help customers improve efficiency, decarbonize operations, and protect the planet. With a history spanning over 140 years, Linde is recognized for its expertise in atmospheric and process gases, as well as its innovative work in clean hydrogen production, carbon capture, and advanced material technologies, all aimed at making the world more productive and sustainable.
